title: The Road to Sabaody: Rising Conflict
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #2, Whitebeard, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #2, Whitebeard, Unknown person #5, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Nyuu~. It's been too long, shaki.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: How long has it been!? 10 years!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You jumped a little too far there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You know, GARP's come after me before.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Shakki used to be a pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Well, he's not here right now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This craftsman guy was a pirate, too!?

summary: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #2, Whitebeard, Unknown person #5, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: rising conflict.
